scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && pnpm --filter @hesper/shared build && pnpm --filter @hesper/persistence build && pnpm --filter @hesper/tools build && pnpm --filter @hesper/agent-runtime build && pnpm --filter @hesper/app-core build && vite build --config renderer/vite.config.ts && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/copy-preload.mjs && node scripts/fix-esm-imports.mjs && node scripts/verify-build.mjs
scripts.dev: pnpm dev:prepare && concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1 renderer" "tsc -w -p tsconfig.build.json" "node scripts/copy-preload.mjs --watch" "node scripts/fix-esm-imports.mjs --watch" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5273 dist/electron/main.js dist/electron/preload.cjs && node scripts/fix-esm-imports.mjs && node scripts/start-electron-dev.mjs"
scripts.dev:prepare: pnpm --filter @hesper/shared build && pnpm --filter @hesper/persistence build && pnpm --filter @hesper/tools build && pnpm --filter @hesper/agent-runtime build && pnpm --filter @hesper/app-core build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/copy-preload.mjs && node scripts/fix-esm-imports.mjs && node scripts/verify-dev-runtime.mjs
